1755640.name: Japanomanic Magazine - Issue #1
1755640.description:
An educational magazine about the history and culture of Japan, to supplement the learning of Karakuri-kun videogame.

It has 4 main sections

CULTURE
HISTORY
POP-CULTURE
FOLK TALE

It is the writer's goal to make a series of magazines to help people learn more about the much loved Japan.

Issue one is a trial test and there may be more content types added in future issues.

Any suggestions of content types is welcome.

There will also be a question page to feature 3 questions from readers about Japan. So, drop your questions in the Steam Forums.
